{{Quote|We have acquired five warships which shall rain destruction on Ubertica—then we will personally land and finish off the survivors one by one to forever erase their memory from this universe.|Savax|<ref name="WAMOS" />}}
'''Ubertica''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Ubertica system/Legends|Ubertica system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. While habitable, it had a relatively low level of atmospheric [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]].

==History==
Ubertica was settled by [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] refugees after the destruction of [[Uba III]]. The Ubese who lived here were called "''[[yrak pootzck]]'' Ubese" by their cousins in the [[Uba system/Legends|Uba system]], a phrase implying cowardice and impure parentage.

Many of Ubertica's settlements were bombarded and destroyed by the forces of the Ubese warlord [[Savax]] during the [[strike against Ubertica]] sometime between [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Only the intervention of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces stopped Savax's forces from completing the bombardment, landing on the planet to kill all the survivors, and continuing to attack other planets in the sector.

==Appearances==
